head.text: Catarrhal headache due to closure of frontal sinuses

eyes.text: Dim sight. Stars and fiery points float before eyes. Easily fatigued from reading

mouth_throat.text: Throat dry; worse inhaling fresh air. Full feeling, burning and scraping sensation. Immediately after eating, sensation as if something stuck in œsophagus, causing swallowing

respiratory.text: Difficult breathing. Chronic bronchial catarrh. Large accumulation of purulent matter and feeble expectoration; worse cold weather. Mucus tough and hard. Heart beats stronger, extends to pit of stomach. Coarse rattling of chest in old people

keynotes.text: color="#800000">AMMONIACUM GUMMI Gum Ammoniac (AMMONIACUM-DOREMA) A remedy for the aged and feeble, especially in chronic bronchitis. Ill humor. Sensitive to cold. Sensation of burning and scratching in neck and œsophagus.
